title: Loop (orchestration + claim register)
goal: Orchestrate: select source (live vs --offline), call github_ingest, apply dependency overlay, build PlanningRequest, call planner, load+validate the claim register (return a structured object), assemble a display-ready result.
implementation_notes: Hard switch: live by default; --offline reads the fixture; NO auto-fallback.
Missing/invalid token, network error, rate limit in LIVE mode => clean message, non-zero exit. NOT fallback.
Claim-register loader returns a structured object, not a string. No claims.py module.
Live depends-on labels build edges; fixture edges are hardcoded.
Missing depends-on target: warn, treat absent, log.
